channel.title: Whamcloud Community JIRA
channel.description: This file is an XML representation of an issue

item.title: [LU-15715] sanity/901 fails on local setup
item.description: as it doesn't take lustre-barrier config into account

status.description: The issue is open and ready for the assignee to start work on it.

comments.comment:
all locks MGC holds for a local setup:

 --- Namespace: MGC192.168.127.250@tcp (rc: 2, side: client)
--- Resource: [0x70616d65646f6e:0x4:0x0].0x0 (00000000f93e48b8) refcount = 2
Granted locks (in reverse order):
### ### nodemap ns: MGC192.168.127.250@tcp lock: 0000000062d2705b/0x65ad6d82e2d4ed2e lrc: 1/0,0 mode: CR/CR res: [0x70616d65646f6e:0x4:0x0].0x0 rrc: 3 type: PLN flags: 0x1000000000000 nid: local remote: 0x65ad6d82e2d4ed35 expref: -99 pid: 5048 timeout: 0 lvb_type: 0
--- Resource: [0x65727473756c:0x0:0x0].0x0 (000000007713bbf8) refcount = 7
Granted locks (in reverse order):
### ### lustre-sptlrpc ns: MGC192.168.127.250@tcp lock: 00000000697d8c9c/0x65ad6d82e2d4eebd lrc: 1/0,0 mode: CR/CR res: [0x65727473756c:0x0:0x0].0x0 rrc: 8 type: PLN flags: 0x1000000000000 nid: local remote: 0x65ad6d82e2d4eec4 expref: -99 pid: 4803 timeout: 0 lvb_type: 0
### ### lustre-MDT0000 ns: MGC192.168.127.250@tcp lock: 00000000bdbaa09a/0x65ad6d82e2d4eeaf lrc: 1/0,0 mode: CR/CR res: [0x65727473756c:0x0:0x0].0x0 rrc: 8 type: PLN flags: 0x1000000000000 nid: local remote: 0x65ad6d82e2d4eeb6 expref: -99 pid: 4803 timeout: 0 lvb_type: 0
### ### lustre-client ns: MGC192.168.127.250@tcp lock: 000000007fb6acd5/0x65ad6d82e2d4eea1 lrc: 1/0,0 mode: CR/CR res: [0x65727473756c:0x0:0x0].0x0 rrc: 8 type: PLN flags: 0x1000000000000 nid: local remote: 0x65ad6d82e2d4eea8 expref: -99 pid: 4803 timeout: 0 lvb_type: 0
### ### lustre-OST0000 ns: MGC192.168.127.250@tcp lock: 0000000091aa0584/0x65ad6d82e2d4ee93 lrc: 1/0,0 mode: CR/CR res: [0x65727473756c:0x0:0x0].0x0 rrc: 8 type: PLN flags: 0x1000000000000 nid: local remote: 0x65ad6d82e2d4ee9a expref: -99 pid: 4803 timeout: 0 lvb_type: 0
### ### lustre-client ns: MGC192.168.127.250@tcp lock: 00000000233c712a/0x65ad6d82e2d4ee85 lrc: 1/0,0 mode: CR/CR res: [0x65727473756c:0x0:0x0].0x0 rrc: 8 type: PLN flags: 0x1000000000000 nid: local remote: 0x65ad6d82e2d4ee8c expref: -99 pid: 4803 timeout: 0 lvb_type: 0
### ### lustre-client ns: MGC192.168.127.250@tcp lock: 00000000e3b42a5d/0x65ad6d82e2d4ee77 lrc: 1/0,0 mode: CR/CR res: [0x65727473756c:0x0:0x0].0x0 rrc: 8 type: PLN flags: 0x1000000000000 nid: local remote: 0x65ad6d82e2d4ee7e expref: -99 pid: 4803 timeout: 0 lvb_type: 0
--- Resource: [0x65727473756c:0x2:0x0].0x0 (00000000cc546ea6) refcount = 3
Granted locks (in reverse order):
### ### lustre-mdtir ns: MGC192.168.127.250@tcp lock: 00000000073cfc91/0x65ad6d82e2d4edf9 lrc: 1/0,0 mode: CR/CR res: [0x65727473756c:0x2:0x0].0x0 rrc: 4 type: PLN flags: 0x1000000000000 nid: local remote: 0x65ad6d82e2d4ee00 expref: -99 pid: 4803 timeout: 0 lvb_type: 0
### ### lustre-cliir ns: MGC192.168.127.250@tcp lock: 000000008230c08b/0x65ad6d82e2d4edc1 lrc: 1/0,0 mode: CR/CR res: [0x65727473756c:0x2:0x0].0x0 rrc: 4 type: PLN flags: 0x1000000000000 nid: local remote: 0x65ad6d82e2d4edc8 expref: -99 pid: 5151 timeout: 0 lvb_type: 0
--- Resource: [0x65727473756c:0x5:0x0].0x0 (0000000012bf47f3) refcount = 2
Granted locks (in reverse order):
### ### lustre-barrier ns: MGC192.168.127.250@tcp lock: 000000006db69c12/0x65ad6d82e2d4ec71 lrc: 1/0,0 mode: CR/CR res: [0x65727473756c:0x5:0x0].0x0 rrc: 3 type: PLN flags: 0x1000000000000 nid: local remote: 0x65ad6d82e2d4ec78 expref: -99 pid: 4781 timeout: 0 lvb_type: 0
--- Resource: [0x736d61726170:0x3:0x0].0x0 (000000007b3256ec) refcount = 4
Granted locks (in reverse order):
### ### params ns: MGC192.168.127.250@tcp lock: 00000000df419210/0x65ad6d82e2d4eeee lrc: 1/0,0 mode: CR/CR res: [0x736d61726170:0x3:0x0].0x0 rrc: 5 type: PLN flags: 0x1000000000000 nid: local remote: 0x65ad6d82e2d4eef5 expref: -99 pid: 4803 timeout: 0 lvb_type: 0
### ### params ns: MGC192.168.127.250@tcp lock: 00000000793f3327/0x65ad6d82e2d4eee0 lrc: 1/0,0 mode: CR/CR res: [0x736d61726170:0x3:0x0].0x0 rrc: 5 type: PLN flags: 0x1000000000000 nid: local remote: 0x65ad6d82e2d4eee7 expref: -99 pid: 4803 timeout: 0 lvb_type: 0
### ### params ns: MGC192.168.127.250@tcp lock: 00000000a3efa2e9/0x65ad6d82e2d4eed2 lrc: 1/0,0 mode: CR/CR res: [0x736d61726170:0x3:0x0].0x0 rrc: 5 type: PLN flags: 0x1000000000000 nid: local remote: 0x65ad6d82e2d4eed9 expref: -99 pid: 4803 timeout: 0 lvb_type: 0

"Alex Zhuravlev <bzzz@whamcloud.com>" uploaded a new patch: https://review.whamcloud.com/46982
Subject: LU-15715 tests: sanity/901 to count barrier profile
Project: fs/lustre-release
Branch: master
Current Patch Set: 1
Commit: e4b15f1507786bb2529573ac0668c263112cc3bd
